neobettercombat.configuration.title: New Better Combat Config
neobettercombat.configuration.refundEner: Melee attacks that don't hit a target won't trigger the weapon cooldown.
neobettercombat.configuration.longerAtta: Melee attacks gain +1 block of range (depth/reach). Disabled by default.
neobettercombat.configuration.widerAttac: Melee attacks use wider hit detection; does not change reach.
neobettercombat.configuration.randomCrit: Melee attacks have a 30% chance to critically strike; crits cannot be blocked.
Chance (0.0 - 1.0) for a random critical strike.
neobettercombat.configuration.requireFul: You may only attack when the attack-strength bar is full. Disabled by default.
neobettercombat.configuration.weakerOffh: Attacking an enemy with an off-hand weapon deals 50% less damage.
neobettercombat.configuration.offhandEff: Off-hand damage multiplier (attack damage x efficiency).
neobettercombat.configuration.attackAndS: Attacking while sprinting will no longer interrupt the sprint.
Every item can sweep (and deal sweep damage). When disabled (default), only sword-tagged weapons sweep.
neobettercombat.configuration.additional: Play an additional sound when striking a target.
Play an additional sound when a critical strike happens.
neobettercombat.configuration.enableOffh: Right-click to attack with the off-hand weapon. Left + right click to slash with both hands.
neobettercombat.configuration.offhand.to: Which items may be used for off-hand attacks.
neobettercombat.configuration.allowSword: Allow weapons tagged #minecraft:swords in the off-hand.
Allow weapons tagged #minecraft:axes in the off-hand.
neobettercombat.configuration.allowPicka: Allow items tagged #minecraft:pickaxes in the off-hand.
neobettercombat.configuration.allowShove: Allow items tagged #minecraft:shovels in the off-hand.
Allow items tagged #minecraft:hoes in the off-hand.
neobettercombat.configuration.mainhandBl: If the main hand is doing one of these, off-hand attacking is disabled.
neobettercombat.configuration.blockWhile: Disable off-hand attacks while the main hand is drawing a bow or crossbow.
Disable off-hand attacks while the main hand is eating or drinking.
Disable off-hand attacks while the main hand is blocking (shield).
Disable off-hand attacks while the main hand is using a trident/spear.
neobettercombat.configuration.entityBlac: Entities that cannot be hit by an off-hand attack.
neobettercombat.configuration.protectArm: Armor stands cannot be hit by off-hand attacks.
neobettercombat.configuration.protectVil: Villagers cannot be hit by off-hand attacks.
neobettercombat.configuration.protectOwn: Your own tamed pets cannot be hit by off-hand attacks.
